footer.tagline: AI-powered career guidance tailored to Indian students' interests and learning style.

explore.title: Explore Resources
explore.subtitle: Based on your interests and strengths, here are some career resources:
explore.skillCoursesDesc: Find courses and resources to build skills for your desired career path. Learn from top platforms with free and paid options.
explore.expertConnectDesc: Book 1-on-1 sessions with career experts who understand your field and can guide your journey with practical advice.

index.heroTitle: Find Your Right Path with SahiRaah
index.heroSubtitle: AI-powered career guidance tailored to your interests and learning style
index.step1Desc: Answer questions about your interests, skills, and learning style.
index.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes your responses to match you with suitable career paths.
index.step3Desc: Get personalized career recommendations and resources to explore them further.
index.testimonial1: SahiRaah helped me discover my passion for digital design when I was considering engineering because everyone else was. Now I'm pursuing a career I truly love.
index.testimonial2: I was stuck between medicine and research. SahiRaah showed me career paths I didn't even know existed, and now I'm studying bioinformatics!
index.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Indian students who found their ideal career with SahiRaah.
